0.text: So, earlier, I told you all about [pulse]SHOVING[/pulse], right?

1.text: Well you definitely need to know about [pulse]GRABBING[/pulse] and [pulse]DROPPING[/pulse]!

2.text: To GRAB and object, just give your [pulse]LMB[/pulse] a quick press.

3.text: Another press and your hands are now freed!

4.text: Some objects have [pulse]MORE MASS[/pulse]. So that might [pulse]SLOW[/pulse] you down substantially.

5.text: Just be smart with your actions and you'll end up fine!
